findings: Run exited with code 1 before task execution because the Claude CLI detected a nested Claude Code session.
stdout.log is empty and stderr.log contains only the launcher guard message, so there is no task implementation output to approve or reject.
The failure appears environmental or orchestration-related rather than evidence about TASK-001 correctness.
follow_up_actions: Rerun RUN-0001 in an environment where the Claude CLI is not invoked from inside another Claude Code session.
Unset the CLAUDECODE environment variable or use the project runner path that avoids nested Claude sessions before retrying.
After a successful rerun, regenerate the review batch if the new run still triggers review.
